message:
test(core-crates): expand test suites across 4 more core crates (+332 tests)

Second batch of test expansion covering async primitives, bootstrap
ceremony, telemetry instrumentation, and sandbox enforcement.

Crate-by-crate breakdown:
- fcp-async-core: 379→440 (+61) — channels, cancellation, mutex/rwlock, watch
- fcp-bootstrap: 449→535 (+86) — ceremony transcripts, hardware tokens, phases
- fcp-telemetry: 479→567 (+88) — trace capture, usage metering, export config
- fcp-sandbox: 448→545 (+97) — egress IPv6/CIDR, WASI clock/RNG, macOS sandbox

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
